---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<video autoplay muted loop playsinline 
         style="width: 100%; max-width: 1000px; height: auto; display: block; border: none;">
```

<source src="skills.mp4" type="video/mp4">

</video>

My work combines **epidemiology, data science, and public health research** with a strong emphasis on **applied analytics, reproducibility, and communication**.

## Technical Skills

### Programming and Software

- R
- SAS
- SPSS
- STATA
- Quarto
- Git and GitHub

### Data Sources and Environments

- Electronic Health Records (Epic and Cerner)
- Clinical datasets
- Survey datasets
- Public health surveillance data
- Population-level health data

### Analytic Methods

- Descriptive and inferential statistics
- Regression modeling
- Predictive modeling
- Machine learning applications in public health
- Survey-weighted analysis
- Data visualization
- Reproducible reporting

### Research and Applied Practice

- Epidemiologic study design
- Health disparities research
- Clinical research recruitment and participation analysis
- Health informatics
- Quantitative data interpretation
- Manuscript and report development

## Strengths I Bring

Beyond technical tools, I bring a strong ability to connect analytic work with meaningful public health questions. I enjoy translating complex data into clear insights, collaborating across disciplines, and designing work that is rigorous, reproducible, and useful in practice.
